description:
The README description of the `cdnBase` config key is unclear — users don't know what format to use or what it controls.

**Fix:** Update README.md config reference table to add an example value and explain what `cdnBase` does (base URL for CDN bundle size estimation, e.g. `https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm`).

**Acceptance criteria:**
- `cdnBase` entry in the README config table has a clear description and example value
- Example shows full URL format
- No other README content changed
title: fix: clarify cdnBase config description in README
